headline: Globe Life Q1 Earnings Miss Estimates, Rise Y/Y on Higher Premiums
summary: Globe Life's Q1 earnings miss estimates despite higher premiums and underwriting gains, as rising expenses weigh on results.

headline: RLI Q1 Earnings Miss Estimates, Investment Income Increases Y/Y
summary: RLI misses Q1 estimates as catastrophe losses weigh on underwriting, though investment income and casualty growth help offset pressure.

headline: Selective Insurance Q1 Earnings Miss Estimates, Revenues Increase Y/Y
summary: SIGI's Q1 earnings miss estimates as catastrophe losses and weak underwriting hit profits, despite strong investment income and modest revenue growth.

headline: Progressive Culture Accolade And Listening Push Versus Recent Share Weakness
summary: Progressive (NYSE:PGR) was ranked No. 1 on Forbes America's Best Employers for Company Culture 2026. The company introduced "Progressive Listens," a new initiative focused on ongoing employee feedback and engagement. For investors watching Progressive at a share price of $202.71, this culture-focused news sits alongside a mixed recent return profile. The stock shows a 65.7% return over 3 years and 125.9% over 5 years, while the 1-year return is an 18.5% decline and year to date the return...

headline: Progressive (PGR): 3 Reasons We Love This Stock
summary: Over the past six months, Progressive’s stock price fell to $203.13. Shareholders have lost 7.9% of their capital, which is disappointing considering the S&P 500 has climbed by 4.8%. This was partly due to its softer quarterly results and might have investors contemplating their next move.

headline: Gas prices are rising, but don't count on significantly lower car insurance premiums as a result
summary: Reducing driving by 10% would save the average person just $27 a year on insurance, according to Insurify.
